EmailTemplate.name: EmailTemplate-AscensionStandardCertification-Reassign
EmailTemplate.Body:
#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "styleSheet" }) #set($styleSheet = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "headerTemplate" }) #set($headerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "footerTemplate" }) #set($footerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Server-Root-Path")) #set($ruleArgs = {}) #set($rootPath = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #set($currentYear = $spTools.formatDate($certification.getActivated(),"YYYY")) #set($dueDate = $spTools.formatDate($certification.getExpiration(),"MMM. dd ")) #set($parentCert = $certification.getParent()) #set($selfCertFlag = $parentCert.isSelfCertificationReassignment()) #if( $styleSheet ) $styleSheet #end #if( $headerTemplate ) $headerTemplate #end
#if ($workItem.getOwner().getDisplayName()) Dear $workItem.getOwner().getDisplayName(),
#elseif($workItem.getOwner().getFirstname()) Dear $workItem.getOwner().getFirstname(),
#elseif($workItem.getOwner().getName()) Dear $workItem.getOwner().getName(),
#else Hello,
#end

#if ($selfCertFlag) One or more Access Reviews have been reassigned to you (or a Workgroup you are a member of) and require action. This reassignment was automatically performed per policy to avoid self-certifications. #else One or more Access Reviews have been reassigned to you (or a Workgroup you are a member of) and require action. #end

$certification.getCertificationName()

Please click here to be directed to your Work Items list, from there you can review individual Access Reviews.

For a User's Guide to completing Access Reviews, reference KB115214.

#if( $footerTemplate ) $footerTemplate #end
EmailTemplate.Description: Email Template for notifying work item owners of new certifications. Arguments --------- workItemName (String): The name of the Workitem workItem (Workitem): The Workitem object certification (Certification): The Certification Object requesterName (String): The display name of the Identity that requested the certification

Argument.name: workItemName
Argument.Description: The description property (also the name property) of the certification WorkItem.

Argument.name: workItem
Argument.Description: The WorkItem object for the certification.

Argument.name: requesterName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that requested the certification.

Argument.name: ownerName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that owns the certification.

EmailTemplate.Subject: -secure- Access Review Reassigned
